news.title: UNI celebrates completed nursing facility for BSN programs
news.summary_en: The University of Northern Iowa is celebrating its newly completed nursing facility, giving students access to advanced, hands-on training designed to mirror real-world clinical environments.

news.title: Dates announced for free Gallagher Bluedorn Block Party series
news.summary_en: The Gallagher Bluedorn Performing Arts Center has announced the 2026 schedule for its free summer Block Party series, with the University of Northern Iowa Sesquicentennial Celebration as the platinum sponsor of the series.

news.title: Student-athlete Julian Farber finds a support system in the Wilson College of Business
news.summary_en: From NCAA Championship runs to mastering the global supply chain, Julian Farber proves grit built on the wrestling mat creates leaders ready for business and beyond.
